item.title: MIUI OS3.0.5.0.WNFMIXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 13 Pro 4G / POCO M6 Pro Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 13 Pro 4G / POCO M6 Pro Global

Codename: emerald

Version: OS3.0.5.0.WNFMIXM | 16.0

Size: 8.1 GB

MD5: 1eb1e97d138ba8d98aefc1b8e532b335

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
